home.title: The URL Shortener for high-performing links
home.description: is a simple and easy to use url shortener platform that allows you to shorten your long urls.

features.title: Shorten, customize, and measure: the power of Linky
features.description: Your ultimate URL shortener partner. Make your links shine with ease.

Feature_1.title: Fast & Reliable
Feature_1.description: High-performance infrastructure ensures your links load quickly every time.

Feature_2.title: Analytics
Feature_2.description: Track clicks, geographic data, and referrers with our powerful analytics.

Feature_3.title: Custom Links
Feature_3.description: Create branded, memorable links that reflect your identity. make them easy to share.

get_started.title: Welcome to
get_started.description: Continue with email address and start shortening your links
get_started.slogan: Your information is safe with us. We don't share it with anyone
get_started.slogan-description: We use advanced security technology to ensure that only you can access your information. High-level encryption, data protection, and secure authentication for your peace of mind.
